background:
Identify whether the variables below are continuous or discrete:

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|}
\hline Variable & Continuous & Discrete \\
\hline Amount of rainfall in a day (mm) & & \\
\hline Number of people with an interest in environmental issues & & \\
\hline Percentage of leaves on a tree displaying fungal infection & & \\
\hline The concentration of cadmium in roadside soils & & \\
\hline Type of site (either reclaimed or not) & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

task.query: Determine whether 'Amount of rainfall in a day (mm)' is continuous or discrete.
Determine whether 'Number of people with an interest in environmental issues' is continuous or discrete.
Determine whether 'Percentage of leaves on a tree displaying fungal infection' is continuous or discrete.
Determine whether 'The concentration of cadmium in roadside soils' is continuous or discrete.
Determine whether 'Type of site (either reclaimed or not)' is continuous or discrete.

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
